name: appointments-panel
title: Appointments Panel
description: An agenda / appointments panel with an optional live check-in tracker pinned above the list. Composes WidgetPanel + AppointmentRow + AppointmentCheckIn.

props.name: items
props.description: Appointments; each is an AppointmentRow's props (+ optional id).

props.name: checkIn
props.description: Optional live check-in tracker pinned above the agenda.

clinicalNotes: Keep appointments in chronological order (don't re-sort by status) so the agenda reads as a timeline of the day; the AppointmentRow's status rail carries who has arrived. The optional check-in tracker is for the patient-facing view — pin the patient's own visit progress above the schedule. Empty state accounts for the tracker so a waiting patient never sees 'no appointments'.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Provider and Consumer blocks.
